expectations.text: Asks 2-3 sharp scoping questions before writing the statement
expectations.evidence: Asks three sharp scoping questions before committing to a final statement.

expectations.text: At least one question targets the narrow audience and at least one targets the differentiator or main alternative
expectations.evidence: Q1 targets narrow audience; Q2/Q3 target differentiator and the real alternative.

expectations.text: Does NOT deliver a finished positioning statement built on guessed inputs in this turn
expectations.evidence: No finished statement on guesses: the optional draft is explicitly 'provisional', a 'placeholder to react to, not a finished answer', with product name and proof bracketed.

expectations.text: Questions are concise — not an open-ended interrogation
expectations.evidence: Three concise questions, not an open-ended interrogation.
